latest_nps_comment: The new editor is a downgrade. We've wasted months trying to adapt.

=== CSM Call Notes — Q1 2026 ===
(Internal use only. Various CSMs.)

Mar 12 - Talked to Acme Corp. They're frustrated with the new editor. 
Might be evaluating Hygraph. VP of Engineering was on the call which is unusual.
They mentioned their contract is coming up and want to "explore options." Sarah flagged
this internally but hasn't heard back from leadership.
latest_nps_comment: Support takes forever. Our P1 sat open for 3 weeks.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Schedule product feedback session', 'Run competitive positioning review']

latest_csm_note:
3/15 acct 1001 - BritePath Solutions (sic) call. No show for the third 
time this quarter. Their admin told me the team has been pulled into a CMS evaluation 
project led by their CTO. Budget was cut 20% across all SaaS vendors.
latest_nps_comment: Support takes forever. Our P1 sat open for 3 weeks.

latest_csm_note:
2026-03-20 | NovaTech Industries | James O.
Extremely tense call. They've had 4 P1 tickets in the last month, all related to the 
v3 SDK deprecation. Their engineering team spent 200+ hours on workarounds. CTO 
joined the call and asked point blank if we have a migration path. I said we do but 
couldn't give a timeline. They mentioned Strapi and Sanity by name. Need to escalate.
latest_nps_comment: Great support team. Always responsive.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Run competitive positioning review', 'Assign migration specialist']

latest_csm_note:
march 25 -- meridian health -- priya
Good news/bad news. NPS came back at 8 (decent) but their actual usage has cratered.
Turns out they built a custom middleware layer and are slowly moving content to a 
homegrown solution. The score reflects the *people* like our support team, not that 
they plan to stay. Classic silent churn pattern. VP of Digital was on the last call 
and asked about data export APIs.
latest_nps_comment: Constant downtime and no communication. We're done.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Schedule product feedback session', 'Assign migration specialist']

latest_csm_note:
3/28 Pinacle Media (acct 1004)
They're fine on the product side but the billing team is furious about the mid-cycle 
price increase. Threatened to go to Contentful. I've offered to set up a call with 
our finance team but they haven't responded. Two missed QBRs in a row.
latest_nps_comment: Support takes forever. Our P1 sat open for 3 weeks.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Run competitive positioning review']

latest_csm_note:
Apr 1 - vanguard retail
just a quick note: they've stopped using workflows entirely since the Feb update broke
their automation. they filed a ticket but it's been open for 6 weeks. the ops manager 
told me she's "lost faith in the roadmap." she used to be our biggest champion there.
latest_nps_comment: We love the CONCEPT but the execution has fallen off a cliff this year.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Schedule product feedback session']

latest_csm_note:
04/03 Atlas Financial
Quarterly business review went poorly. They brought their CISO and asked about our 
SOC 2 audit timeline (we're behind). Also asked about single-tenancy options which 
we don't offer on their current plan. They're in a regulated industry so this is a 
dealbreaker if we can't address it. Also on SDK v3.1 and hitting the deprecated 
endpoints daily.
product_recommendations: ['Prioritize SDK v4 migration', 'Review security roadmap', 'Assign migration specialist']

latest_csm_note:
4/5 - Zenith Publishing (#1007)
Renewl conversation started. They want a 30% discount or they walk. Current ARR is 
high but margin is already thin. Editor performance on their 50k+ entry library is 
painful and they know it. Competitor POC with Kontent.ai is apparently already underway.
CRO was cc'd on the last email thread which is never a good sign.
latest_nps_comment: Fine for now but we're watching competitors closely.
product_recommendations: ['Schedule product feedback session', 'Run competitive positioning review']

latest_csm_note:
3/10 - crescent labs
Happy with the product overall but their new VP of Marketing wants to see an ROI 
report before signing off on renewal. Asked for case studies in their vertical 
(biotech). We don't have any ready. I need to work with marketing on this.
Usage is stable but not growing.
latest_nps_comment: Fine for now but we're watching competitors closely.

latest_csm_note:
3/18 orion education (1009)
They love the product but are merging with another ed-tech company that uses WordPress.
Unclear which platform survives. Decision expected by May. Their champion (Director 
of Content) is nervous about her own role post-merger. She's been our main advocate.

march 22 TerraFirma Manufacturing
Had a call. They're interested in the new Agent OS features once it GAs. Want to be 
in the early access program. But their current implementation is a mess -- they 
never finished the original migration from Drupal 18 months ago. Half their content 
is still on the old system. Might not renew unless we can give them a dedicated SA 
for 2 weeks to clean it up.
latest_nps_comment: Good product, needs better documentation.

latest_csm_note:
3/26 skyline travel (1011)
They're expanding internationally which is great, but struggling with our locale 
management. Filed 3 tickets about locale fallback behavior. On SDK v4.0 so they 
missed the fix in v4.2. Could go either way on renewal. They asked to talk to PM.
latest_nps_comment: Solid CMS but the pricing feels steep for what we get.

latest_csm_note:
April 2 - Quantum Commerce 
renewal call scheduled for next week. They want to add 20 seats but only if we 
can match a competing offer from builder.io at $X/seat. Currently on Growth plan. 
API usage is actually up 40% MoM which is good leverage for us.
latest_nps_comment: El producto es bueno pero el soporte en español es inexistente.

latest_csm_note:
4/4 RedLeaf Healthcare
Compliance audit coming up. They need us to fill out a vendor security questionnaire 
by May 15 or they can't renew (company policy). I submitted the request to our 
security team on 3/20 but haven't gotten a response. This is time-sensitive.
latest_nps_comment: Le produit est bon mais l'interface n'est pas intuitive pour notre équipe marketing.

latest_csm_note:
04/07 bluepeak software
They're a developer-heavy team and love the DX of our APIs but hate the management 
console UI. Their VP of Product called it "embarrassing to demo to stakeholders."
They renewed last year with reluctance. On the fence this time. NPS was 6.

4/8 evergreen media 1015
Product is fine, team is fine, but their parent company got acquired and all vendor 
contracts are under review. New procurement team is asking for enterprise-level 
SLAs on their Growth plan pricing. It's a negotiation game.
latest_nps_comment: Le produit est bon mais l'interface n'est pas intuitive pour notre équipe marketing.

latest_csm_note:
4/9 Northstar Logistics
account 1016 -- they barely use the product. 2 active users out of 15 seats. 
most content was migrated but nobody adopted the new workflow. classic 
shelfware situation. Their IT director told me they'd rather downgrade to Starter 
than pay full price for something they don't use. not churn per se but 
significant ARR contraction risk.
latest_nps_comment: 产品功能还可以，但客服团队沟通效率太低了。我们多次要求更换客户经理都没有得到回应。非常失望。

loves the product. renewal is a formality according to their VP of Eng.
latest_nps_comment: Transformed how our team publishes content. Love it.
